title: College of Defence Management Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for MTS, Steno and More Posts
post_name: Civilian Motor Driver, Cook, MTS, Steno Gde-II
short_info: College of Defence Management has released the official Civilian Motor Driver, Cook, MTS, Steno Gde-II Notification 2026. A total of 8 vacancies have been announced under the College of Defence Management Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 18 to 27 years with 12th, Matriculation, ITI qualification, heavy vehicle driving licence and relevant experience can apply offline up to 30 days from the date of publication of Notification in the Employment News. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.
last_date: 30 days from the date of publication of Notification in the Employment News.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 30 days from the date of publication of Notification in the Employment News.

age_limit.details: Civilian Motor Driver (Ordinary Grade): Minimum Age: 18 years, Maximum Age: 27 years Cook: Minimum Age: 18 years, Maximum Age: 25 years Multi-Tasking Staff (Office & Training): Minimum Age: 18 years, Maximum Age: 25 years Steno Gde-II: Minimum Age: 18 years, Maximum Age: 27 years

qualification.education_qualification: 12th Class or equivalent, Matriculation Pass, ITI Pass Certificate, Driving License for Heavy vehicles, Experience in driving heavy vehicles.
qualification.details: Civilian Motor Driver (Ordinary Grade): 12th Class or equivalent from a recognized Board or University. Must possess the Civilian Driving License for Heavy driving vehicles. Two years' experience from a recognized Organization or Undertaking in driving heavy vehicles from Regional Transport Authority. Cook: 12th Class or equivalent from a recognized Board or University. Two years' experience from a recognized Organization or Undertaking in the trade. OR Industrial Training Institute Pass Certificate as Cook from a recognized University. Multi-Tasking Staff (Office & Training): Matriculation Pass or equivalent from a recognized Board/ Institute. Steno Gde-II: 12th Class or equivalent from a recognized Board or University.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://cdm.ap.nic.in, www.indianarmy.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30 days from the date of publication of Notification in the Employment News.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the College of Defence Management Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for the receipt of applications for the College of Defence Management Recruitment 2026 is 28th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies announced for various posts including Civilian Motor Driver, Cook, MTS, and Steno Gde-II in the College of Defence Management Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum educational qualification required for MTS posts?
faq.answer: For the Multi-Tasking Staff (Office & Training) posts, the minimum educational qualification required is Matriculation Pass or equivalent from a recognized Board/ Institute.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Cook post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Cook post is between 18 years (minimum) and 25 years (maximum). Age relaxation may be applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the College of Defence Management Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for the Steno Gde-II post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Steno Gde-II post will be as per Pay Matrix Level-4, which ranges from ₹25,500 to ₹81,100.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any experience required for the Civilian Motor Driver post?
faq.answer: Yes, for the Civilian Motor Driver (Ordinary Grade) post, two years of experience in driving heavy vehicles from a recognized organization is required, along with a valid heavy driving license.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official websites of the College of Defence Management, which are https://cdm.ap.nic.in and www.indianarmy.nic.in.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process details are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for complete information on the selection procedure.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The College of Defence Management is located in Secunderabad, Telangana (Pincode: 500094).
